zh: 單親家庭可能因為成員不完全、
而在子女教育上有所缺失、
en: may have gaps in their children's education,
but this is not an absolute.

zh: 重點在於家長心裏是否健康、
en: What truly matters is whether the parent is mentally healthy.

zh: 只要家長的心理夠健康、
en: If the parent is psychologically sound,

zh: 必能找到方法去彌補一切的缺失、
en: they will surely find ways to compensate for any gaps,

zh: 一個成員不缺的雙親家庭、
en: even a two-parent family with all members present
will, if the parents are mentally unwell,

zh: 仍然會教育出不健康的下一代、
en: still raise an unhealthy next generation.

zh: 這是大家需具備的正確觀念。
en: This is the correct perspective everyone needs to hold.
